message.content:
The health check for the specified container returned successfully. Here are the details of your Prometheus server status:

- Status: Healthy
- Service Name: prometheus-mcp-server
- Version: 1.5.3 (Note that in a real scenario, you would expect an actual version number here)
- Timestamp of Health Check Reported At: February 25th, 2026 at 02:00 AM UTC
- Transport Protocol Used for Metrics Collection and Exporting to Prometheus: HTTP
- Configuration Details:
  - The Prometheus URL is configured.
  - Authentication configuration has not been set up (which may or may not be desirable depending on the context).
  - Organization ID configuration details are missing, which could mean that either this information isn't necessary for your specific setup and therefore hasn't changed from its initial state.

- Connectivity with Prometheus: Healthy
- The URL of the configured Prometheus instance is http://prometheus-server.monitoring.svc.cluster.local:80

The container appears to be running without any apparent issues, as indicated by a healthy status report.
